review_title: The best program to know the status of your computer
description: It has been a great program that has helped me since college as it allowed me to take better care of my computer and now in my professional life it allows me to know what is wrong with a computer and fix it.
author: Ricardo O.
pros: I love that with the help of this program, it is possible to know and document the problems that the computers of the inventory and the office have and to be able to solve them in the best possible way.
cons: The graphical interface is not very friendly, it could be improved so that an inexperienced user understands each value it shows.

author: daniel Z.
pros: probably the best hardware monitor tool out there. easy to use and tells you everything you need to know about your system health
cons: dont have anything that i dont like about the sw

description: It does it's job great, but you have to be knowledgeable about IT to use it right.
author: Damir H.
pros: So many options! At the beginning I thought that it is bloated with so many options, but as my career advanced into more detailed server troubleshooting, I find that every option is there for a reason.
cons: A bit intimidating to use at first, but at least you can not do any harm by just clicking around. I could not find any appropriate documentation.

review_title: This is the best monitoring application for your computer.
description: Fantastic, I've tried other products from gigabyte and MSI but you can literally feel the processing power those suck up, my mouse even lags sometimes when I'm in MSI even it's so poorly optimized and I've got an i9 with a 3000 series graphics card.
author: Matthew W.
pros: They just do exactly what you want them to do. There is no fluff or added features to make things look nice that could take up extra processing power (which you definitely don't want to do if you are monitoring your data in the first place, especially temps). This program is so lightweight and you get all of the data right there, first page when you open the program, no need for tutorials, no need to turn it off when your computer is running hot, it's the perfect program for monitoring your computer.
cons: There's nothing to not like, maybe for some people a nicer looking application would be a priority for whatever reason, but if you are monitoring temps, at least for me, you want all the data, 0 fluff, and lowest processing power to obtain it and display it, and that's exactly what HVMonitor does. It also has a few other helpful tools I've used but it's mostly just the front page data.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Make sure your computer doesnt melt!
description: It's a simple took that does what it needs to do. Hard to ask for more!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: As a hobbyist PC builder and overclocker, I rely on tools to make sure I'm not damaging my hardware. I like to know and make sure that everything is flowing smoothly, my temps are in the right ranges, and that all components are working properly. HVMonitor has been crucial in that for years for me. I find that it is resource light and information is extremely accurate. It's one of the first things install when I build a new PC.
cons: I would love the ability to skin it, and customize the look.

author: Miguel Ángel A.
pros: I've been an user of HWMonitor since December 2020 and I am very happy with the results it has given me. Having built my first PC I had to be sure that everything worked correctly and HWMonitor was the one that helped me. It's not a demanding software and fulfills its function. I'm really satisfied with the accuracy of the information that HWMonitor gives me.
cons: Being a software with a single function that performs correctly, I do not see any negative points.

review_title: great software to analyze and monitor your computer parts
description: overall experience, I would really recommend this software to anyone, it is much safer than staying without monitoring.
author: Zakaria B.
pros: I'm using this software for a long time, I start using it once I bought my gaming PC, it is a really great software to control your computer parts, it gives you many details about your device like the parts information, temperature, CPU usage, clock speed,voltage, memory speed, and many informations, more than that you can export a monitoring txt file.
cons: the software is perfect, I'm always using it, nothing is bad

review_title: Easy to use and free to use
description: I use this software to monitor the temperature of my CPU, which is overclocked. It is important to keep a close eye on if temperatures are getting too high, so I can check if my CPU cooler is correctly mounted, or that the case is tightly sealed, which could affect air flow. It has worked perfectly the whole time I have had it installed, and I would recommend it to others.
author: Grant H.
pros: I like that I can monitor the temperature of my CPU, which is overclocked, with this software
cons: I don't dislike anything about this software, so I have nothing to say that is negative about it.

review_title: HVMonitor a excellent way to know the system performance
description: I love this software, it is easy to use and helps a lot.
author: Luis Humberto A.
pros: Excellent way to learn about your system performance and see if everything is right, it doesn't have a overwhelming hud and is easy to use
cons: No negatives, it's simple, it works and you don't need a lot.

review_title: CPU Z for all information of your PC
author: Cameron C.
pros: This will tell you exactly what you are running and more!
cons: If you are not an Admin on the network or system the information becomes limited

review_title: Miglior software gratuito per la gestione e analisi componenti hardware pc
author: Marco M.
pros: Hwmonitor di CPUID e sicuramente il miglior software per la gestione e l analisi dei componenti hardware del PC. E un programma gratuito molto leggero e di facile utilizzo
cons: Aggiornerei sicuramente la grafica e rimasta uguale ormai da anni

description: E uno strumento fondamentale per me che sono appassionato di informatica, permette di gestire in maniera semplice e facilitata tutti i parametri fondamentali del pc watt, temperature ecc .
author: francesco B.
pros: E' uno strumento fondamentale per monitorare il proprio hardware in tempo reale , fondamentale per chi realizza pc e oc. Grafica intuitiva e semplice me lo fa preferire ad altri competitor.
cons: Per me che utilizzo la versione free nessuno.

author: Gustavo M.
pros: Ele é fácil de encontrar e depois de usar algumas vezes você consegue utilizar com mais facilidade.
cons: Para iniciantes talvez seja um pouco complexo distinguir as informações.

review_title: And easy to use software to see the temperatures and voltages of your computer.
description: Let me being monitoring my pc status in real time, in every moment.
author: Adrian G.
pros: Very simple. Easy to understand and with a real time response. The software its extremely light , you can use it in everykind of computer.
cons: The hud it's too simple. The app it's too specific, It only has one purpose, could be more striking.

author: Alessia Z.
pros: Software completo e gratuito, varie versioni specifiche per i diversi tipi di CPU, interfaccia utente intuitiva e semplice ma non spartana, solo senza fronzoli inutili. Applicazione per PC veloce e facile da scaricare dal loro sito ufficiale.
cons: In realtà non credo che abbia difetti, considerando anche che è gratuito.

author: James R.
pros: Easy to install, set up, and use. Gives all the information needed for most users.
cons: Some hardware gives inaccurate readings, and the app doesn't always know about that.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
